emails.team_invitation.subject: Invitation to join :teamName
emails.team_invitation.title: You're Invited!
emails.team_invitation.body: :inviterName has invited you to join the **:teamName** team. Join the team to start collaborating.

emails.client_portal.subject: Access your client portal — :teamName
emails.client_portal.title: Your client portal is ready
emails.client_portal.body: **:teamName** has invited you to access your client portal. From this space, you can view your documents, invoices, quotes, and communicate securely.
emails.client_portal.features: You'll be able to find your documents, track your invoices and quotes, and communicate with the team.
emails.client_portal.auto_login: This link will log you in automatically. You can set your password from your profile once connected.
emails.client_portal.set_password: This link will let you set your password and access your portal.
emails.client_portal.ignore: If you were not expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.
